blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,495 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
